name: TreeVirtualizedItemList
description:
Renders tree items in a virtualized scrolling container.
Only items visible in the viewport (plus an overscan buffer) are rendered.
Place inside `Tree.Root` to render items alongside other children like `Tree.Empty`.

Requires `@mui/x-virtualizer` as a peer dependency.

itemHeight.description:
The fixed height (in pixels) of each item row.
Required for virtualization calculations.

overscan.description: The number of pixels to render above and below the visible area.

children.description: The render function for each tree item.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

style.detailedType:
| React.CSSProperties
| ((
    state: Tree.VirtualizedItemList.State,
  ) => CSSProperties | undefined)
| undefined

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: Tree.VirtualizedItemList.State,
  ) => ReactElement)
